title: HIGH: toast re-export creates hard sonner dependency in public API
description:
H6: src/components/ui/index.ts line 279:
```tsx
export { toast } from 'sonner'
```
This exports sonner's raw toast function directly into the library's public API. If sonner makes a breaking change (v3→v4), this library breaks too. Consumers can't tell where `toast` comes from. Fix: Create a thin wrapper that re-exports the toast type signature but insulates from sonner internals.
resolution: Created typed ToastAPI wrapper isolating consumers from sonner internal types
